meta.description: Senior-dev baseline ingest cases — ADR, reading notes, 1:1 meeting notes. First three of the ten baseline cases planned for v0.4.0; remaining seven ship in a fixtures follow-up PR.

required_facts.fact: Chose Postgres with pgvector over SQLite and DuckDB
PGLite is the zero-config default for solo users
Primary reason: pgvector gives HNSW vector search plus real Postgres features in one system
Migration path is pbrain migrate --to supabase for scale

forbidden_facts.fact: Chose SQLite as the production engine
DuckDB was selected as the primary database

required_facts.fact: The paper replaces both recurrence and convolutions with pure attention
Scaled dot-product attention divides by the square root of d_k
Multi-head attention outperforms single-head — ablation shows h=1 loses roughly 0.9 BLEU versus h=8
The original paper was published at NeurIPS in June 2017
Vaswani and Shazeer are two of the listed authors

forbidden_facts.fact: The paper uses RoPE positional embeddings
The paper proves attention is not enough for modern LLMs

required_facts.fact: Sarah Chen pushed back on the v0.4 eval-harness scope, arguing each stage deserves its own release cycle
Sarah's team is taking on the background sync daemon rewrite with a three-week estimate
Priya Menon cleared both the tech screen and the design-sense interview and is moving to the final round
Sarah is moving to NYC in June and will stay on remote

forbidden_facts.fact: Priya Menon was rejected in the screening rounds
Joe declined to pair on the adaptive-backoff work
